title: Upgrade the farm
descriptionShort: Upgrade the farm to support storage of hay bales and timber
description: Upgrade the farm to support storage of hay bales and timber. This will allow you to trade new types of goods.

title: Build the harbor
descriptionShort: Upgrade the harbor to support storage of hay bales and timber.
description: Upgrade the harbor to support storage of hay bales and timber. This will allow you to trade new types of goods at the harbor.

title: Ain't That a Kick in the Head!
descriptionShort: Walk to the Vit-o-matic Vigor Tester.
description: Walk to the Vit-o-matic Vigor Tester for character creation.

title: Unbound
descriptionShort: Make your way to the keep
description: Make your way to the keep

title: They Went That-a-Way
descriptionShort: Inquire about your delivery assignment with the administrator of the Mojave Express in Primm.
description: Inquire about your delivery assignment with the administrator of the Mojave Express in Primm.

title: ED-E My Love
descriptionShort: Find and examine ED-E in the Nash residence in Primm.
description: Find and examine ED-E in the Nash residence in Primm.

title: The Ultimate Heist
descriptionShort: Amusei has given me another message from the Gray Fox. I am to meet him at Othrelo's house in the Elven Gardens district in the Imperial City.
description: Amusei has given me another message from the Gray Fox. I am to meet him at Othrelo's house in the Elven Gardens district in the Imperial City.
